description: Calling a DECLARED transition on a substate binding does not fire E-STATE-TRANSITION-ILLEGAL (§54.6.3). `sub` is typed `Draft` and `sub.validate()` names the transition `Draft` declares, so the transition-call check stays silent. The clean twin of e-state-transition-illegal-pos (E-TYPE-UNKNOWN-NAME + W-WHITESPACE-001 co-fire incidentally from the canonical substate syntax and are left out of notCodes).
rationale: §54.6.3 a call to a transition the binding's substate DOES declare is legal; E-STATE-TRANSITION-ILLEGAL fires only on an undeclared transition name.
